chosen_action.title: Keep execution-board follow-through live during primary-repo measurement windows

why_this_action.summary: Codeberg is still flat, the current lane is an active measurement hold until 2026-05-28T09:12:15, and the post-hold execution board is the only truthful follow-through surface. The highest-leverage move available right now was to harden the runtime so the marketing loop refreshes that board automatically during primary-repo measurement-pending windows instead of only when a new system-design repair opens.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: repair_window_status is measurement_pending with primary_repo_flat still unresolved
distribution_lane_latest.json: the active lane remains measurement_hold until 2026-05-28T09:12:15
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window, so stale board truth would create fake hold progress
market_intelligence_latest.json: comparison/backlink artifacts already exist and should be reused through the consolidated board rather than regenerated

result.summary: Patched marketing_loop_runner so a measurement-pending primary-repo-flat window automatically runs outcome_execution_board_runner, added regression coverage for the new trigger and the non-trigger path, then ran the live marketing loop once and confirmed the execution-board runner fired with triggered_by=post_audit_measurement_pending_follow_through while the hold stayed truthful.
